docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,722.53 FILED BY DESIGN & TYPE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT X-PERT PRINTING INC. CRAMP, M.L. "MARGARET" ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT X-PERT PRINTING INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT X-PERT PRINTING INC.
CASE WAS HEARD BY SLAVIT IN LIEU OF SLOAN.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESIGN & TYPE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT X-PERT PRINTING INC. CRAMP, M.L. "MARGARET" $2,722.53 PRINCIPAL, $63.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,785.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT X-PERT PRINTING INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,822.63 AS TO DEFENDANT X-PERT PRINTING INC.
